Sobre.title: About me
Sobre.bio: Computer Engineer with experience in support, software development, and data analysis. Skilled in back-end development with PHP, Node.js, JavaScript, C#, Java, and DataFlex, with additional experience in MySQL and PostgreSQL databases.
